zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Pigot於1373年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾時，他的父親Sir Randolph Pigot39歲，母親Joan de Clotheram23歲。他於1398年與Johanna de Ledes在英國越可爾利朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1420年在英國英格蘭艾可霍可維爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey Pigot于1373年出生在英国英格兰越可爾时，他的父亲Sir Randolph Pigot39岁，母亲Joan de Clotheram23岁。他于1398年与Johanna de Ledes在英国越可爾利朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1420年在英国英格兰艾可霍可維爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Pigot was born in 1373, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Randolph Pigot, was 39 and his mother, Joan de Clotheram, was 23. He married Johanna de Ledes in 1398, in Ripon, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1420, in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Pigot est né en 1373, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Randolph Pigot, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan de Clotheram, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Johanna de Ledes en 1398, à Ripon, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1420, à Hawkwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Pigot 1373 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Randolph Pigot 39 und seine Mutter Joan de Clotheram 23. Er hat 1398 in Ripon, Yorkshire, England Johanna de Ledes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1420 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Hawkwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Pigot è nato il nel 1373 nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Randolph Pigot, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Clotheram, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Johanna de Ledes nel 1398, nel Ripon, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1420, nel Hawkwell, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Pigot(이)가 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Randolph Pigot(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Clotheram(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1398년 영국 요르크실르 리폰에서 Johanna de Ledes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 호k웰에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Pigot родился в 1373 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Randolph Pigot было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Clotheram, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna de Ledes в 1398 г. в местности рипон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1420 г. в местности ховквелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Johanna de Ledes en 1398, en Ripon, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1420, en Hawkwell, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
